ksa_text: Ability to align strategic business objectives, technology capabilities, and operational priorities to establish coherent organizational direction.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-A-003 (Operational Excellence) scores 0.463 composite (signal: moderate). Scope fit for Synthetic Data Engineer: out_of_scope. Preliminary decision: exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: out_of_scope) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Synthetic Data Engineer.
